questions.question: Define file and explain its significance in an operating system. Provide an example of a file system that uses a file as its basic unit of storage.
questions.hint: Operational definitions, significance, and common file systems

questions.question: A file system uses a file's metadata to manage it. Describe the different types of metadata that a file system uses to manage files and explain their significance.
questions.hint: File types, metadata, and their importance

questions.question: Explain the difference between a file and a directory in an operating system. Provide an example to illustrate the distinction.
questions.hint: File vs directory, file attributes, and example
